name: Proof-Chain Support
scope: Add explicit transitive support for positive universal all/all proof chains.
Keep the v0.8 externalized benchmark fixture shape stable.
Generate a v0.9 proof-chain report comparing against the committed v0.8 receipt.
Document the narrow claim and remaining limitations.

required_checks: v0.8 report remains available for comparison

known_limits: Only positive universal all/all chains are supported.
The task set is curated and normalized into TS-Reasoner relation form.
The result is a toy-scope receipt, not a broad benchmark claim.
next_target: Do not broaden benchmark claims until proof-chain support is tested beyond the tiny normalized fixture.
